column1: # Model -> fuel-variant mapping for wholesale data (which has no fuel column).
# fuel_variants = all drivetrains the nameplate sold during 2017-2026 (pipe-separated);
# primary_fuel = the variant believed to dominate its volumes (approximate!);
# ev_only = 1 means every unit is an EV (the only allocation that is exact).
# Compiled from OEM lineups/press releases; quality: approximate. Models absent
# here (~0.2% of volume) get NULL fuel. 'Hybrid' = strong hybrid only.
